responses: Hello! Welcome to Akshaya Institute of Technology. How may I assist you today?
Akshaya Institute of Technology, Tumakuru, is a reputed engineering college with modern infrastructure, experienced faculty, and focus on quality education.
We offer Engineering programs in Computer Science, Information Science, Electronics, Civil, Mechanical, AI and Data Science, and Agricultural Engineering.
The fee structure varies by course and category. On average, it ranges between 50000 and 150000 per year.
Admissions are through KCET, COMEDK, or management quota. You can apply online or visit the college.

In the 2025-26 placement drive, more than 10 companies visited our campus including Cloud Built, Basant Technologies, Inner Circle, Tata Electronics, Bosch and Planet.

Around 107 plus students were successfully placed.

The highest package offered is 12 LPA and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA.
